scripts.build:gitee: tsc -b && vite build --mode gitee && node scripts/postbuild-gitee.mjs
scripts.pack: npm run build && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/pack-dist.ps1
scripts.deploy: npm run build && cd dist && npx vercel deploy --prod --yes
scripts.deploy:cf: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=consultant-beta-survey
